description.ja: 朝7時から開くパン屋。鹿肉カレーパンと焼きたてクロワッサンが名物
description.en: A bakery opening from 7 a.m. Signature items include venison curry bread and fresh croissants.

alt.ja: 朝霧ベーカリーのイメージ

body.ja: 朝霧がまだ通りに残るうちに、焼きたてのパンを紙袋へ入れてもらった。袋の底が少し温かくて、今日の散歩はここから始まる気がした。
body.en: While morning mist still lingered on the street, fresh bread was tucked into a paper bag. The warm bottom of the bag made the walk feel like it began here.

unlockHint.ja: 朝に開くパン屋を探す。川の東側、宿が集まる道の近く。
unlockHint.en: Look for the bakery that opens in the morning, east of the river near the inns.

name.ja: 定山渓ブリューハウス

description.ja: 定山渓の水をイメージしたクラフトビールの店。夜のハッピーアワーは混雑必至
description.en: A craft beer spot inspired by Jozankei water. The evening happy hour is expected to be busy.

alt.ja: 定山渓ブリューハウスのイメージ

body.ja: グラスの泡がほどけるたび、定山渓の水のことを少しだけ知った気になった。外の夜風に当たる前に、最後の一口をゆっくり飲んだ。
body.en: Each time the foam settled, I felt as if I understood Jozankei water a little better. Before stepping into the night air, I took the last sip slowly.

unlockHint.ja: 夜ににぎわうクラフトビールの店。温泉街中心部の少し東側を探す。
unlockHint.en: Find the nighttime craft beer spot slightly east of the town center.

image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a beer glass against a plain background

description.ja: 渓谷の間をゆっくり流れる川。大きな音はしないが、耳を澄ますと絶えず水の音が続いている。何もしなくても時間が進むのを感じられる。
description.en: A river moving slowly between the valley walls. Its constant water sound makes time feel present even without doing anything.

alt.ja: 翡翠川のイメージ

description.en: A slender waterfall running down the rock face, its white streams looking like threads of rain.

alt.ja: 糸雨の滝のイメージ

description.ja: 赤や黄色が幾重にも重なる山の景色。
description.en: A mountain view layered with reds and yellows, especially vivid in the turning season.

alt.ja: 錦重ね山のイメージ

description.ja: 温泉街と渓谷の位置関係を見渡せる小さな高台。昼は川筋や宿の並びが読み取りやすく、夕方以降は月明かりが斜面を静かに照らす。
description.en: A small lookout for reading the shape of the hot spring town and valley. By day, the river line and inns are easy to trace; after dusk, moonlight settles quietly on the slope.

alt.ja: 月見の高台のイメージ

image_alt.ja: 苔むした石の間を流れる水の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of water flowing over mossy stones

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Felix Mittermeier on Pexels

description.ja: 二見公園のそばにある、流れがゆるむ川辺。風のない朝は水面に木々の色が映り、季節によって違う表情に見える。
description.en: A quiet riverside pool near Futami Park. On still mornings, trees reflect on the surface and the colors shift with the season.

alt.ja: 鏡葉の渕のイメージ

image_alt.ja: 霧のある静かな川と木々の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a misty quiet river and trees

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Dominika Gregusova on Pexels

description.ja: 渓谷にかかる小さな歩道橋。下を流れる川の音と、橋の上を抜ける風が心地よい。
description.en: A small pedestrian bridge over the valley, where river sound below and wind across the deck feel refreshing.

alt.ja: ゆらぎ橋のイメージ

image_alt.ja: 森の中を流れる小川の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a stream flowing through a forest

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by belen capello on Pexels

description.ja: 朝になると薄い霧がかかる川。水面近くが白く霞み、散歩道から眺めると温泉街の朝らしさを感じられる。
description.en: A river veiled by light morning mist. From the walking path, the white surface feels like a Jozankei morning.

alt.ja: 浅霧川のイメージ

body.ja: 川面の上だけが白くぼやけて、向こう岸の木々が少し遅れて目を覚ますように見えた。足音を小さくすると、水の流れだけが朝を進めていた。
body.en: Only the river surface blurred white, and the trees across the water seemed to wake a moment late. When my steps grew quiet, only the current carried the morning forward.

unlockHint.ja: 北東側の川沿い、朝霧が出る散歩道を探す。
unlockHint.en: Search the northeastern riverside path where morning mist gathers.

image_alt.ja: 山と森に囲まれた細い川の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a narrow river surrounded by mountains and forest

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Connor McManus on Pexels

description.ja: 温泉街の散策中に立ち寄れる小さな滝。岩に当たる水音が湯けむりの気配と混ざり、街中でも少し足を止めたくなる。
description.en: A small waterfall to pause by while walking through the hot spring town. Water striking the rocks mixes with the sense of rising steam, making the town feel briefly still.

alt.ja: こだま滝のイメージ

image_alt.ja: 苔むした石の間を流れる水の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of water flowing over mossy stones

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Felix Mittermeier on Pexels

description.ja: 川と森に挟まれた細い渓谷。観光地のにぎわいから少し離れて、静かに歩きたいときに向いている。
description.en: A narrow valley between river and forest, suited to a quiet walk away from the busier sightseeing area.

alt.ja: 静音の渓谷のイメージ

image_alt.ja: 霧のある静かな川と木々の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a misty quiet river and trees

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Dominika Gregusova on Pexels

description.ja: 夜に空を見上げるための展望台。街灯りから少し距離を置ける場所で、晴れた日は温泉街の上に星が増えていくのを待てる。
description.en: An observatory for looking up at the night sky. Set slightly away from the town lights, it is a place to wait as stars gather above Jozankei on clear nights.

alt.ja: 星待ち展望台のイメージ

title.en: A Place to Wait for Stars

body.ja: 街の灯りから離れると、空の暗さが急に深くなった。星が増えるのを待っている間、自分の息だけが白く残った。
body.en: Away from the town lights, the sky suddenly grew deeper. While I waited for more stars to appear, only my breath stayed white.

unlockHint.ja: 南東の高台にある、夜空を見上げる展望台を探す。
unlockHint.en: Search the southeastern high ground for the observatory made for looking at the night sky.

image_alt.ja: 森の中を流れる小川の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a stream flowing through a forest

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by belen capello on Pexels

description.ja: 川の音を聞きながら足を温められる足湯。散策の途中で少し休むのにちょうどよい。
description.en: A footbath where guests warm their feet while listening to the river, ideal for a short pause during a walk.

alt.ja: せせらぎ足湯のイメージ

title.en: A Rest by the River Sound

body.ja: 足を湯に入れると、川の音が少し丸く聞こえた。長く歩いたわけではないのに、ここで休む理由はもう十分だった。
body.en: Once I slipped my feet into the bath, the river sounded softer. I had not walked far, but I already had enough reason to rest here.

unlockHint.ja: 中心部の川沿いで、せせらぎを聞きながら入れる昼の足湯を探す。
unlockHint.en: Find the daytime footbath near the central riverside where the stream can be heard.

image_alt.ja: 岩場を流れる水と湯けむりを思わせる雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of water over rocks with a steamy mood

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Tobias Bjorkli on Pexels

description.ja: 湯けむりがふわりと上がる川沿いの足湯。夕方は空の色が変わっていく様子を眺められる。
description.en: A riverside footbath with soft rising steam. In the evening, guests can watch the sky slowly change color.

alt.ja: 湯けむり足湯のイメージ

body.ja: 足元の湯から上がる湯けむりが、街灯の下でほどけていった。昼よりも静かな川沿いで、時間だけがゆっくり冷えていく。
body.en: Steam rising from the footbath loosened under the streetlights. Along the quieter riverside, only time seemed to cool slowly.

unlockHint.ja: 川沿いで湯けむりが見える夜の足湯。中心部から少し東を探す。
unlockHint.en: Look slightly east of the center for the nighttime riverside footbath with visible steam.

image_alt.ja: 岩場を流れる水と湯けむりを思わせる雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of water over rocks with a steamy mood

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Tobias Bjorkli on Pexels

description.ja: 木のぬくもりを感じる落ち着いた旅館。夜になると窓の外に小さな灯りが並び、静かな時間を過ごせる。
description.en: A calm inn with warm wooden textures. At night, small lights line the windows for a quiet stay.

alt.ja: 山灯りの宿のイメージ

body.ja: 窓の外に並ぶ小さな灯りを数えていたら、いつの間にか声を落としていた。木の匂いのする部屋で、夜は静かに長くなった。
body.en: Counting the small lights beyond the window, I found my voice had grown quiet. In the room scented with wood, the night stretched gently.

unlockHint.ja: 北東の宿エリアで、夜に窓明かりが並ぶ旅館を探す。
unlockHint.en: Search the northeastern inn area for the ryokan with window lights at night.

image_alt.ja: 自然光が入る落ち着いた客室の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a calm guest room with natural light

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Lisa Anna on Pexels

name.ja: 湯守の宿 まつかぜ

description.ja: 昔ながらの温泉旅館。湯上がりに休める広間があり、ゆっくり過ごす旅に向いている。
description.en: An old-fashioned hot spring inn with a lounge for resting after the bath, suited to a slow trip.

alt.ja: 湯守の宿 まつかぜのイメージ

image_alt.ja: 建物の窓が並ぶ宿泊施設風の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of orderly windows on lodging-like architecture

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required
image_credit: Photo by Jan van der Wolf on Pexels

description.ja: 渓谷を望む部屋がある温泉旅館。朝は川の音で目が覚める。
description.en: A hot spring inn with rooms facing the valley. In the morning, guests wake to the sound of the river.

alt.ja: 渓泉楼のイメージ

body.ja: 部屋の窓を開けると、渓谷の風が布団の端を揺らした。目覚ましより先に川の音で起きる朝は、旅先の時間だと思った。
body.en: When I opened the room window, valley air moved the edge of the futon. Waking to the river before an alarm felt like travel time.

unlockHint.ja: 北東の宿エリアで、渓谷を望む昼の旅館を探す。
unlockHint.en: Look in the northeastern inn area for the daytime ryokan facing the valley.

description.en: A hotel in the center of the hot spring town, convenient for first-time visitors exploring nearby sights.

description.ja: 季節の花を飾った小さな旅館。派手さはないが、手入れの行き届いた庭を眺められる。
description.en: A small inn decorated with seasonal flowers. Its well-kept garden gives the stay a quiet charm.

description.en: A homey guesthouse known for breakfast made with local ingredients.

description.ja: 森の中に建つ一棟貸しのコテージ。友人や家族で静かに過ごしたい人に向いている。
description.en: A private cottage in the forest for friends or families who want a quiet stay together.

alt.ja: 森のコテージ ノカのイメージ

description.ja: 広いロビーと大きな窓が特徴のホテル。温泉街と自然の両方を楽しめる。
description.en: A hotel with a broad lobby and large windows, making it easy to enjoy both the town and nature.

alt.ja: 渓谷リゾートホテルのイメージ

description.ja: 散策の途中に立ち寄れる日帰り温泉。内湯と休憩スペースがあり、短い滞在でも使いやすい。
description.en: A day-use hot spring for stopping by during a walk, with indoor baths and a resting space for short visits.

alt.ja: 湯の庭のイメージ

body.ja: 湯から上がって休憩所に座ると、短い滞在でも体の芯だけが旅を覚えていた。次の道へ戻る前に、もう一度だけ手ぬぐいを絞った。
body.en: After the bath, I sat in the rest area, and even a short visit stayed warm at my core. Before returning to the path, I wrung out the towel once more.

unlockHint.ja: 南西側の散策路寄りにある、日帰りで立ち寄れる温泉を探す。
unlockHint.en: Search the southwest walking-route side for a day-use hot spring.

image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a warm wooden hot spring space

description.ja: 木々に囲まれた露天風呂。季節ごとに変わる森の色を眺めながら入れる。
description.en: An open-air bath surrounded by trees, with forest colors that change from season to season.

alt.ja: 森見の湯のイメージ

image_alt.ja: 木のぬくもりを感じる温泉空間の雰囲気写真
image_alt.en: Atmospheric photo of a warm wooden hot spring space

image_license: Pexels License - Free for commercial use, attribution not required

description.ja: 夜に入ると空が広く見える露天風呂。晴れた日は星を眺めながら温まれる。
description.en: An open-air bath where the sky feels wide at night. On clear evenings, guests can soak under the stars.

alt.ja: 星影の湯のイメージ

body.ja: 露天の湯面に星が揺れて、本物の空とどちらを見ているのか分からなくなった。肩まで沈むと、夜の冷たさが遠ざかった。
body.en: Stars trembled on the open-air bath, and I could not tell whether I was watching the water or the real sky. Once I sank to my shoulders, the night chill moved away.

unlockHint.ja: 北側の広い空が見える場所にある、星を眺める夜の湯を探す。
unlockHint.en: Find the nighttime bath on the northern side where the sky feels wide.

description.en: A hot spring using free-flowing source water, with a strong mineral scent and a deeply onsen-like feel.
